changes: Tests: switch from RefreshDatabase to DatabaseTransactions — tests no longer wipe production data

Fix: Booking model missing time_slot_id in $fillable
Fix: Admin reject() now sets status to 'rejected' instead of 'cancelled'
Fix: Admin bookings Blade orphaned JS / closeModals() restored
Migration: add 'rejected' and 'suggestion_pending' to bookings status ENUM
Backup: production data copied to kristineskates_test DB
